last_result: Cycle 43 complete. SI #35 Compute-Robustness Stratification confirmed as structural theorem (0.73): formal derivation shows lim_{T→∞}[temporal+informational] = 0, lim_{T→∞}[structural] = C_base - ceiling_TCA(r) > 0. Key mechanisms: temporal delay O(N×τ)/T → 0; informational per-step gain doesn't change ceiling; structural CPP gap is T-independent (SI #34). CPP-Unification Corollary: CPP property of probes IS compute-robustness property, not scheduling mechanics — infinite rotating high-CPP criteria is structural; infinite rotating low-CPP criteria is temporal. Concavity confidence upgraded 0.50→0.55 with weak structural argument (gradient descent finds low-hanging fruit first). D4 streak: 38. Mean: 0.710 (35 SIs). Band: [0.65-0.76]. 35 confirmed SIs, 0 candidates.
